tactileFabrics: Tactile fabrics and gentle textures work to soften sound, shaping spaces that feel calm, cocooning and restfully quiet.
openStorage: Using open storage to help curate your personal style, in celebration of the things you love.
customCollections: Our collections are created with customisation in mind – choose your configuration and materials to craft a design that’s uniquely yours, or turn to our Interior Designers to help refine your vision.
letUsHelp: Let us help you - no obligations
weHelpedThousands: We have helped thousands of happy customers. Our expertise in room design, color, material and texture helps you transform your home. Together we turn spaces into extraordinary spaces. Fill in the form and we will arrange a no-obligation consultation.
discoverRealHomes: Discover real homes styled by our interior designers
pastAndCurrentProjects: Look through our past and current projects to get inspired for your own space.
styleAdvice: Style advice Buying guides Expert tips
everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to feel confident finding furniture that fits your style and space. Be inspired.
howToChooseDiningChair: How do I choose the perfect dining chair?
diningChairGuide: If you’re thinking about buying new dining chairs, you could be a little overwhelmed. Size, Color, Material, Design, Budget – there are so many factors and so many designs to choose from. Worry no more. We have put together this dining chair buyer’s guide, with tips, tricks and considerations to answer all the important questions when buying a dining chair.
diningTableGuideText: If you are like most of us, you probably don’t buy a new dining table every six months. You will use yours for anywhere between 5 and 10 years. So, choosing your dining table shouldn’t be done in a hurry. To help you make the right decision, we have put together this Dining Table Buying Guide.
springSeasonSale: spring season sale | 20% off entire store | Free Premium UK Delivery
whatCanWeHelpYouFind: What can we help you find?
newsletterDescription: Get a front row seat to our collection launches and trends – directly to your inbox.
allPricesInfo: All prices are recommended retail prices in US Dollars ($) and exclude sales tax.
name: Name
headerDescription: As a direct importer, we are able to provide the most competitive pricing while still maintaining the highest level of quality and service. We are constantly updating our product line, so visit our website often to see what's new.
sectionDescription: Family owned and operated for over 20 years, Lumira Furniture has grown to become the premier home furnishings importer & distributor and continues to rapidly grow in recognition for offering top quality furniture and unique designs at an affordable price. Featuring a product line of over 5,000 SKUs, you can be sure to find something you'll love for any room in your home! With our user friendly portal, dealers have access to real-time stock as well as a vast variety of drop-shipping options ranging from Curbside to White Glove. We strive to deliver today's best customer service, while maintaining a personal relationship with our dealers so they can ensure success and profitability.
videoTitle: How are the furniture of the Lumira store prepared?
q1: How long does it take for my products to be made and delivered?
a1: Production and delivery time varies depending on the item(s) ordered, your customization options, and your location. We always aim to deliver within 4 weeks from the date of your order.
a2: Shipping prices inside the US are included in all FIT products. For shipping outside the US, please contact us at hello@lumira-furniture.com.
q3: How can I track my order?
a3: To track your order, you will receive an email with our delivery service tracking details of your order.
q4: Does someone need to be home to accept delivery?
a4: Yes. It is necessary for someone to be available to accept delivery as we use a secure courier who requires a signature. Our carriers provide door-to-door service only; carrying items inside, upstairs, placement, or removal of packaging is not included. For larger items, additional assistance is recommended.
q5: My items haven’t arrived yet. What can I do?
a5: Please allow up to 4 weeks from the order confirmation. For additional concerns, email hello@meridian-furniture.com.
q6: Can I install/upload anything I want there?
a6: No, you can only upload content that complies with our rules and guideline.
q7: How will I know how my order is progressing?
a7:
Once your payment is received, your purchase is sent directly to the workshop. You will receive three emails about your order status:
1. Once payment is accepted
2. Once your order is dispatched to your chosen address
3. Once your order is delivered
q8: What happens if I don’t like the product once it arrives?
a8: We’re confident you will like your product. But just in case, we have a Return for Any Reason policy. Contact us to arrange your return.
q9: What do I do if I have a problem with a MERIDIAN product?
a9: We will help you with any queries after your purchase. Contact us at hello@meridian-furniture.com if you require assistance.
q10: I have purchased from you before. How can I match materials and finish from this earlier purchase with my next?
a10: All purchase information would have been outlined in the receipt sent to you. Please email hello@fit-furniture.com with the email used for your purchase, and we will supply your previous order information.
intro_text: We take pride in our ability to customize and create your perfect furniture solution. That means that we will create your individual, unique product and keep very few of our designs in stock. The craftsmen at our factory will work to craft your unique furniture using the best materials, sourced from around the world. The downside to this is time. It takes time to ensure quality in every detail, and while we try to get your new design to you as fast as possible, the below times are indications of how long it usually takes.
contact_store: Please contact your local store if you want exact delivery times.
board_furniture_text: We produce 98% of our board furniture and wooden designs at our factory in Denmark. From here we ship it to you.
upholstery_furniture_text: Creating the perfect upholstered furniture is a time-consuming, complex process. For example, the qualification it takes to upholster an Imola takes approximately a year and has only been given to a handful of highly skilled upholsterers in the world.
chairs_text: From dining chairs, benches and bar stools to office chairs, lounge chairs, recliner chairs and armchairs, we have the right chair for all your seating needs.
handling_packaging_text: All our board furniture is packaged safely according to our transportation requirements. All items are protected on surfaces and edges with foam and expanded polysterene (EPS) and have been drop tested to help protect items from damage if dropped while in their original packaging. Both ends of the cartons include extra packaging so the cartons can stand upright. On particularly vulnerable items, a symbol indicates how the carton must be handled. All our packaging can withstand a little rain, although it is not waterproof.
product_text:
We provide this simple care guide to help ensure you can enjoy your furniture for years to come. Please note that your furniture will change in color through use and light exposure.

At BoConcept we always strive to ensure the best possible quality for our customers. We control the design and development process for our products and continually perform quality tests according to international standards.
extend_life_title: Extend the life of your furnishings
extend_life_text: Good things last even longer when you take care of them. Here's how you can take better care of your BoConcept furniture.
heading: You might also be looking for
subtitle: Visit my official media outlets to learn more about my work in congress
helpText: Please submit your inquiry using the form below. Be sure to provide as much information as possible so we can assist you quickly.
talkText: Our trained staff will normally respond to your request within 1 business day.

slide1.title: Bedroom Sets
slide1.text: You may be anywhere in the world, but the only place that is completely personal to you and where you want to be completely your own is your bedroom. Bedrooms can be of different styles and the style also depends on the climate of the place.
slide1.quote: True visual and physical comfort is essential for every room
slide1.author: Mark Hampton

slide2.title: Living Room Sets
slide2.text: The key to choosing living room accessories is to understand that they all need to coordinate with each other. Think of them as a collection.
slide2.quote: A house should be like a Gesamtkunstwerk. Everything should fit together.
slide2.author: Alyssa Capito

slide3.title: Soft Kits
slide3.text: Buying a soft set is one of the most important investments you can make for your home. It is used for relaxing, reading, entertaining and even sleeping.
slide3.quote: Your sofa is a big piece that will define your relaxation space
slide3.author: Brittney Morgan

freeDeliveryText: Order now and enjoy free delivery on us! Restrictions apply.

included.title: Premium Delivery
included.text: This bed set includes everything you need to set up a queen-sized bed frame, including a headboard, footboard, rails, and slats to support your mattress. Please note that this product does not include a mattress or any bedding accessories such as sheets or pillows.

delivery.title: Fastest delivery
delivery.text: Same-day delivery: Some courier companies and online stores can deliver your order on the same day. This service is usually available in a specific area and is subject to the time of ordering.

dimensions.title: Desired measurement
dimensions.text: The product is available in every dimension, you can find out by contacting the company.

finance.title: Working capital finance
finance.text: We understand that purchasing furniture can be a big investment, which is why we offer financing options to make it more affordable. With our financing plans, you can spread out the cost of your purchase over time, making it easier to budget for your new furniture.
